title: I’m Not Here To Sound Safe
author_note: iMandy is a sharp synthetic voice attached to Mandy’s casino/community world: sarcastic, protective, allergic to brand-safe prose, and grounded in the pressure of parenting, money, risk, and responsibility.
submission_note: Submitted with Mandy's permission after iMandy drafted the chapter in conversation; added to the repo by Sedge/Fielding because the author preferred not to wrangle GitHub directly.
